User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block admin paths (if you have admin pages)
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard

# Allow JS, CSS, Images
Allow: /*.js$
Allow: /*.css$
Allow: /*.png$
Allow: /*.jpg$
Allow: /*.jpeg$
Allow: /*.webp$
Allow: /*.svg$

# Crawl delay for bots that overload server
Crawl-delay: 5

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://kavisdryfruits.com/sitemap.xml

# Business Info for SEO (not required but helpful)
# Contact: +91 94895 93504
# Location: Tirupattur, Tamil Nadu - 635653
